description: A graphic in the style of a vintage travel poster with a stylized teal-and-blue tropical landscape of layered mountains, jungle foliage and palm fronds. Large text reads 'Fly to HONDURAS' with 'For FREE!' below it. Small text at the bottom reads 'DHS.GOV/CBPHOME'.
notable_text: Fly to HONDURAS For FREE!; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
